query:
-- ดูสัญญาที่ bad_debt_amount < 1000 (อาจเป็น fallback ระดับ 2)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as count_under_1000,
  SUM(bad_debt_amount) as sum_under_1000
FROM contracts
WHERE bad_debt_amount > 0 AND bad_debt_amount < 1000 AND section = 'Fastfone365';
